meta.og_description_home: The official Wiki for Uchu Addon. Information about the roles is gathered here.

footer.about_desc_html:
An addon for the Among Us MOD "Nebula on the Ship".
New roles and game modes bring a broader experience.

home.addon_info_html:
Uchu Addon is an addon for the Among Us MOD "Nebula on the Ship".
It adds new roles and game modes for a broader gameplay experience.
home.password_prompt: This page is password-protected. Please enter the password.

roles.section_subtitle: All roles including Crewmate, Impostor and Neutral
roles.guideline_1_body_html:
Porting permission: We do not claim copyright over the ideas, gameplay, or logic of roles originally designed by UchuAddon. You may freely port them to other environments or create modified versions.
However, this does not apply to roles derived from other MODs. Please refer to "3. Roles derived from other MODs" below.
roles.guideline_2_body_html: Prohibited: Extracting the button illustrations, images, effects, textures, and other resources included in this addon (as-is or modified) and porting/using them in other MODs or projects is strictly prohibited.
roles.guideline_3_body_html: Compliance: For roles in this addon that originate from other MODs, please follow the rules and guidelines established by each original MOD.
roles.guideline_3_disclaimer_html: Disclaimer: The Uchu Addon team takes no responsibility for troubles or rights infringements arising from porting roles of other MODs.

gallery.terms_intro: Buttons and illustrations that appear in this addon. You may use them in streams and videos.
gallery.terms_allowed_1: Image assets in videos and streams
gallery.terms_allowed_2: Image assets for SNS icons, headers and covers
gallery.terms_prohibited_1: Falsely claiming authorship of the illustrations
gallery.terms_prohibited_3: Any other use that causes trouble to the parties involved
gallery.terms_footer: Please use these assets with the above in mind.
